title: RSA Decryption Process
description: Decrypt message using RSA private key
mermaid: graph TD A1[fa:fa-file-text-o Encrypted Message (C)] --> B1["Private Key (d, n)"] B1 --> C1{C < n?};style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 C1 -- Yes --> D1(M = C<sup>d</sup> mod n) C1 -- No --> E1[Error: Invalid Input (C >= n)] style E1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff style D1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff D1 --> F1[Decrypted Message (M)] style F1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
entities: Private Key (d, n))B1 --> C1{C < n?};style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 C1 -- Yes --> D1(M = C<sup>d</sup> mod n)C1 -- No --> E1[Error: Invalid Input (C >= n)
